# claude-desktop-gateway

> A local third-party inference gateway that lets Claude Desktop run on
> OpenRouter models (GPT, Gemini, Llama, DeepSeek, and others), OpenCode/Zen
> models, or a ChatGPT Codex OAuth backend, instead of Anthropic's hosted API.
> It uses Claude Desktop's own supported third-party ("3P") inference mode,
> so no patching or reverse-engineered protocol is involved.

claude-desktop-gateway is an unofficial, independent open-source project. It
is not affiliated with Anthropic, OpenRouter, OpenCode, or OpenAI. It ships a
CLI (plain Node.js, no dependencies) and an optional Electron tray app.

Core flow:

```
Claude Desktop -> local gateway -> OpenRouter Anthropic-compatible /v1/messages
Claude Desktop -> local gateway -> OpenCode Console/Zen OpenAI-compatible API
Claude Desktop -> local gateway -> ChatGPT Codex OAuth Responses API
```

The gateway exposes the model route Claude Desktop expects
(`claude-sonnet-4-5`) locally, while forwarding the real request to whatever
upstream model is configured (`OPENROUTER_MODEL`, `OPENCODE_MODEL`, or
`CODEX_MODEL`).

## Documentation

- [README](./README.md): full setup instructions, CLI quickstart, desktop
  app guide, environment variables, and FAQ.
- [SECURITY.md](./SECURITY.md): threat model and vulnerability reporting.
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md): development setup and pull request
  guidelines.

## Source

- [src/openrouter-gateway.mjs](./src/openrouter-gateway.mjs): local HTTP
  server exposing `/v1/messages`, `/v1/models`, `/health`, forwarding to
  OpenRouter.
- [src/codex-oauth-gateway.mjs](./src/codex-oauth-gateway.mjs): same local
  API, forwarding to the ChatGPT Codex OAuth backend.
- [src/opencode-oauth-gateway.mjs](./src/opencode-oauth-gateway.mjs): same
  local API, forwarding to OpenCode Console/Zen model endpoints.
- [src/openrouter-oauth-login.mjs](./src/openrouter-oauth-login.mjs):
  OpenRouter PKCE OAuth login flow.
- [src/opencode-oauth-login.mjs](./src/opencode-oauth-login.mjs): OpenCode
  Console device OAuth login flow.
- [src/platform-paths.mjs](./src/platform-paths.mjs): per-OS config and
  credential file locations.
- [scripts/configure-openrouter.mjs](./scripts/configure-openrouter.mjs):
  writes Claude Desktop's third-party mode config.
